sentences.english: Red colour is a symbol of danger.
sentences.hindi: लाल रंग खतरे का प्रतीक है।
sentences.pronunciation: red colour is a symbol of danger

sentences.english: The sky looks blue.
sentences.hindi: आसमान नीला दिखता है।
sentences.pronunciation: the sky looks blue

sentences.english: Green colour is a symbol of peace.
sentences.hindi: हरा रंग शांति का प्रतीक है।
sentences.pronunciation: green colour is a symbol of peace

sentences.english: He is wearing a yellow shirt.
sentences.hindi: उसने पीली शर्ट पहनी है।
sentences.pronunciation: he is wearing a yellow shirt

sentences.english: Everyone likes black colour.
sentences.hindi: काला रंग सबको पसंद है।
sentences.pronunciation: everyone likes black colour

sentences.english: White colour represents purity.
sentences.hindi: सफेद रंग शुद्धता दर्शाता है।
sentences.pronunciation: white colour represents purity

sentences.english: This flower is orange in colour.
sentences.hindi: यह फूल नारंगी रंग का है।
sentences.pronunciation: this flower is orange in colour

sentences.english: Purple colour is considered royal.
sentences.hindi: बैंगनी रंग शाही माना जाता है।
sentences.pronunciation: purple colour is considered royal

sentences.english: She likes pink colour a lot.
sentences.hindi: उसे गुलाबी रंग बहुत पसंद है।
sentences.pronunciation: she likes pink colour a lot

sentences.english: Brown coloured soil is fertile.
sentences.hindi: भूरे रंग की मिट्टी उपजाऊ होती है।
sentences.pronunciation: brown coloured soil is fertile

sentences.english: The hearing is going on in the court.
sentences.hindi: अदालत में सुनवाई चल रही है।
sentences.pronunciation: the hearing is going on in the court

sentences.english: The judge announced the verdict.
sentences.hindi: जज ने फैसला सुनाया।
sentences.pronunciation: the judge announced the verdict

sentences.english: The lawyer argued the case.
sentences.hindi: वकील ने बहस की।
sentences.pronunciation: the lawyer argued the case

sentences.english: The law is equal for everyone.
sentences.hindi: कानून सबके लिए समान है।
sentences.pronunciation: the law is equal for everyone

sentences.english: There should be no delay in justice.
sentences.hindi: न्याय में देरी नहीं होनी चाहिए।
sentences.pronunciation: there should be no delay in justice

sentences.english: The witness told the truth.
sentences.hindi: गवाह ने सच बताया।
sentences.pronunciation: the witness told the truth

sentences.english: Evidence was presented in the court.
sentences.hindi: सबूत अदालत में पेश किए गए।
sentences.pronunciation: evidence was presented in the court

sentences.english: The trial went on for three years.
sentences.hindi: मुकदमा तीन साल चला।
sentences.pronunciation: the trial went on for three years

sentences.english: The jury made the decision.
sentences.hindi: जूरी ने फैसला किया।
sentences.pronunciation: the jury made the decision

sentences.english: The court found the accused guilty.
sentences.hindi: अदालत ने आरोपी को दोषी पाया।
sentences.pronunciation: the court found the accused guilty
